author: IGN YouTube
text:
Halloween: The Game - Official Haddonfield Town Center Map Reveal Trailer
Watch the Haddonfield Town Center Map Reveal Trailer for Halloween: The Game, the upcoming asymmetrical horror multiplayer game developed by Illfonic. Players can get a look at the latest revealed map as the Haddonfield Town Center falls to dark forces. Check out a suite of different locations in the Haddonfield Town Center Map in Halloween: The Game, launching on September 8 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Black Voices in Gaming 2026 Summer Game Fest Showcase
Black Voices in Gaming returns with an exciting global collection of upcoming indie titles, interviews and gameplay, and developer deep dives from Black creators.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
007 First Light - Official Accolades Trailer
Take a look at the Accolades Trailer for 007 First Light, the latest third-person action-adventure game based on the untold origin story of James Bond, developed by IO Interactive. Players will embark on a grand adventure full of action, espionage, and thrills set in the world of 007. Don't miss the critical reception behind 007 First Light, available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
MIDSUMMER NIGHT'S SCREAM: A Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Discover some of the best games coming out in 2026 and beyond!

Your hosts Phil Dickens, Ash Millman and Will Penkeyman are ready to take you on another dark, scare-filled journey through deep caves filled with new titles, exclusive trailers and thrilling gameplay reveals. 100+ games will be covered, with 50+ world premiere trailers in over two hours of upcoming horrors, so there’s plenty to keep you busy and set your wishlists overflowing!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
In Hope Voiden - Official Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
A forbidden warzone. Twelve soldiers. One life each. In this first-person survival horror, death is permanent and the world remembers. Get another look at In Hope Voiden in this trailer for the upcoming first-person survival horror game. In Hope Voiden will be available on PC.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Where Dolls Hang - Official Announcement Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Check out the Where Dolls Hang announcement trailer for this upcoming survival horror game where you play as a detective searching for victims on both land and boat, in a cursed swamp forest known as Forest of Dolls. Investigate, find clues, document bodies, place victims in body bags, craft weapons, and customize shelters as you struggle to survive. Where Dolls Hang will be available on PC.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Vampire Huntress: Lament of the Sun - Official Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Get a fresh look at Vampire Huntress: Lament of the Sun in this trailer for the upcoming survival horror game set in a dark gothic world. Play as Luna Ashcroft and explore an interconnected world filled with incomprehensible horrors, mind-bending puzzles and countless secrets. Are you ready to face the horrors of the night? The hunt starts now. Vampire Huntress: Lament of the Sun will be available on PC.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dreadline Express - Official Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Get another look at Dreadline Express in this trailer for the upcoming first-person, psychological horror metroidbrainia set aboard the last human train. Unravel mysteries of the enigmatic train, face strange passengers, and shape your path using a unique card-based mechanic that gives you full narrative control. This is no longer our world. Dreadline Express will be available on PC. Dreadline Express will take part in Steam Next Fest this June 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dive or Die: Children of Rain - Official Gameplay Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Every descent is a deadly gamble. Get another look at Dive or Die: Children of Rain in this latest trailer for the upcoming 2D Lovecraftian underwater roguelite. Dive or Die in the cursed abyss, face Eldritch horrors to uncover the mystery of the black rain. Scavenge and upgrade, recruit and sacrifice. Save your camp... The Flood is coming. Dive or Die: Children of Rain will be available on PC.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Abyss of Doom - Official Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Embark on a grim adventure through the depths of medieval dungeons and ancient Roman ruins. Flee or fight the spawn of nightmares using only whatever is at hand. Unravel mysteries that have remained unsolved for centuries. Watch the latest Abyss of Doom trailer for this upcoming psychological horror adventure game. Abyss of Doom will be available on PC.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Funskin Project - Official Demo Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Watch The Funskin Project for this upcoming survival horror game. The Funskin Project will be available on PC, and a demo is out now on Steam. Now that a snowstorm has devastated the region, the only way to continue your journey is through the castle of the mysterious Baron Fetuccini. Arriving at the castle, you discover a nightmare from which it seems impossible to escape. Explore varied labyrinthine environments in a non-linear way, solve puzzles and riddles, and carefully manage your resources in this survival horror game where the slightest encounter can be fatal. Meet other characters who are also trapped in the castle. Assisting them may help you unlock the secrets behind the mysterious Funskin Project.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Encryptid - Official Story Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Encryptid is a 90s-inspired FMV horror game about hunting and catching cryptids. Use real-world footage recorded exclusively via the Gameboy Camera to identify, locate and battle iconic creatures of myth and folklore. Do you like cryptids? Get another look at Encryptid in this latest trailer for the game, coming to PC in 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Cosmic Fear - Official Launch Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Cosmic Fear is a disturbing Lovecraftian first-person horror adventure from the author of The Land of Pain and The Alien Cube. Investigate signs of an ancient presence and uncover a forgotten chapter of humanity’s past. Watch the latest Cosmic Fear trailer ahead of the game's launch on Steam on September 9, 2026. A demo is out now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Liminal Point - Official Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Get a fresh look at Liminal Point in this new trailer for the upcoming survival horror game. Drawn to Ashen Point by a cryptic voicemail, Lyra returns to the island where her band’s story ended in tragedy. Shrouded in fog and prowled by horrors, confront deadly creatures, explore the desolate town, and reveal the truth behind the night that changed everything. Liminal Point will be available on PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG), Xbox Series X/S, and PlayStation 5 (PS5).

#ign #gaming
